CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, original_string VARCHAR, padding_char VARCHAR, total_length INT);
SELECT lpad(original_string, total_length, padding_char) AS padded_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, lpad(original_string, total_length, padding_char) AS padded_string FROM test_strings WHERE total_length > LENGTH(original_string);
CREATE TABLE additional_strings (id INT, suffix VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO additional_strings VALUES (1, ' XYZ'), (2, ' ABC'), (3, ' 123');
SELECT CONCAT(lpad(ts.original_string, ts.total_length, ts.padding_char), asuffix) AS formatted_string FROM test_strings ts JOIN additional_strings as ON ts.id = as.id;
SELECT lpad('short', 8, '0') AS left_padded, lpad('exactlength', 12, '-') AS padded_exact, lpad('longerthanneeded', 5, '*') AS padded_over FROM test_strings;
SELECT lpad(id::VARCHAR, 6, '0') AS padded_id FROM test_strings;
SELECT (SELECT lpad(original_string, 5, '-') FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2) AS nested_test_case;
WITH padded_results AS (SELECT id, lpad(original_string, total_length, padding_char) AS padded_string FROM test_strings) SELECT id, padded_string FROM padded_results WHERE padded_string LIKE '%%>%%';
